nvm-sh/nvm.message: [Fix] `debug`: correct mistaken `-V` to `--version` from #2922
removed_lines: -        nvm_err "awk: $(nvm_command_info awk), $({ command awk -V 2>/dev/null || command awk -W version; } \
added_lines: +        nvm_err "awk: $(nvm_command_info awk), $({ command awk --version 2>/dev/null || command awk -W version; } \

nvm-sh/nvm.message:
[Fix] Regression in 2dad045

Fixes #2599
removed_lines: -    NVM_NPM_CONFIG_x_PREFIX_ENV="$(command set | command awk -F '=' '! /^[0-9A-Z_a-z]+=/ {exit} {print $1}' | nvm_grep -i NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX | command tail -1)"
added_lines: +    NVM_NPM_CONFIG_x_PREFIX_ENV="$(command set | command awk -F '=' '! /^[0-9A-Z_a-z]+=/ {skip=1} skip==0 {print $1}' | nvm_grep -i NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX | command tail -1)"

nvm-sh/nvm.message: [Fix] `nvm debug`: Fix sed syntax error in nvm_command_info()
[Fix] Add missing "command" prefix for "tr", fix #1725
[Robustness] add a missing `command` to a `sed` call
removed_lines: -        NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$(nvm_echo "$NVM_IOJS_VERSION" | sed "s/^$NVM_IMPLICIT-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"
added_lines: +        NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$(nvm_echo "$NVM_IOJS_VERSION" | command sed "s/^$NVM_IMPLICIT-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"

nvm-sh/nvm.message: [Refactor] create `nvm_echo` and `nvm_err`
removed_lines: -        NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$(echo "$NVM_IOJS_VERSION" | sed "s/^$NVM_IMPLICIT-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"
-  MINOR="$(echo "$PREFIXED_VERSION" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2)"
-  INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e '/\(empty\)/ d' -e 's/^.* \(.*@[^ ]*\).*/\1/' -e '/^npm@[^ ]*.*$/ d' | command xargs)
-      echo '    --reinstall-packages-from=<version>     When installing, reinstall packages installed in <node|iojs|node version number>'
added_lines: +        NVM_IOJS_VERSION="$(nvm_echo "$NVM_IOJS_VERSION" | sed "s/^$NVM_IMPLICIT-//" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2 | uniq | command tail -1)"
+  MINOR="$(nvm_echo "$PREFIXED_VERSION" | command grep -e '^v' | command cut -c2- | command cut -d . -f 1,2)"
+  INSTALLS=$(nvm_echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e '/\(empty\)/ d' -e 's/^.* \(.*@[^ ]*\).*/\1/' -e '/^npm@[^ ]*.*$/ d' | command xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Don't check `$1` unless `$#` is >= 1.

Fixes #873. Partially fixes #868.

[shellcheck] read without -r will mangle backslashes.

http://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/009695399/utilities/read.html / https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/wiki/SC2162
Make sure `nvm debug` doesn't use an overridden `sed`

Oops, the string passed to `awk` isn't the same as a shell command.

Fixes #808.
`nvm reinstall-packages` should install the same version it had before.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e '/\(empty\)/ d' -e 's/^.* \(.*\)@.*/\1/' -e '/^npm$/ d' | command xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e '/\(empty\)/ d' -e 's/^.* \(.*@[^ ]*\).*/\1/' -e '/^npm@[^ ]*.*$/ d' | command xargs)
+      LINKS="$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -n 's/.* -> \(.*\)/\1/ p')" # | command sed -e '/^ *$/d;s/.*/"&"/')

nvm-sh/nvm.message: nvm reinstall-packages: On systems where `npm ls -g --depth=0` does not include `npm` for some reason, make sure to filter out `(empty)`.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e 's/^.* \(.*\)@.*/\1/' -e '/^npm$/ d' | command xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(echo "$NPMLIST" | command sed -e '/ -> / d' -e '/\(empty\)/ d' -e 's/^.* \(.*\)@.*/\1/' -e '/^npm$/ d' | command xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Remove external calls to `sed` using parameter filtering.

POSIX-compliant per http://stackoverflow.com/a/25536935/632724

Relates to #709
removed_lines: -  echo "$1" | command sed -e 's/^v//' | command awk -F. '{ printf("%d%06d%06d\n", $1,$2,$3); }'
-  NVM_NUM_DOTS=$(echo "$VERSION" | command sed -e 's/^v//' | command sed -e 's/\.$//' | command sed -e 's/[^\.]//g')

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Supresses error message on checking source options
Only filter the package npm, not any package name contains 'npm'
removed_lines: -        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -v npm | command xargs)
-        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -v npm | command xargs)
added_lines: +        INSTALLS=$(nvm deactivate > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -vx npm | command xargs)
+        INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | command tail -n +2 | command grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | command cut -c 2- | command grep -vx npm | command xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Suppressing extraneous output from #622.
Ensure nvm follows redirects to nodejs.org
Use _ instead of ~ as a sentinel
Use `nvm_normalize_version` in `nvm_version_greater`
`npm ls` has a bug in some versions when "--parseable --depth=0" is used together.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use "$VERSION" > /dev/null && npm list -g --depth=0 | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e ' [^@]*' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message:
Don't try to copy `npm` itself with `nvm copy-packages`.

Fixes #504.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | \grep -v npm | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make sure the new `versions` directory is filtered out of nvm_ls output (in zsh).
Should escape grep in copy-packages.
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | \grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make `nvm ls` support listing the "versions" directory when it's present.
Attempt to improve `nvm copy-packages`
removed_lines: -      INSTALLS=`nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm -g -p ll | \grep "$ROOT\/[^/]\+$" | cut -d '/' -f $(($ROOTDEPTH + 2)) | cut -d ":" -f 2 | \grep -v npm | tr "\n" " "`
added_lines: +      INSTALLS=$(nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm list --global --parseable --depth=0 2> /dev/null | tail -n +2 | grep -o -e '/[^/]*$' | cut -c 2- | xargs)

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Ensure that `nvm ls node` doesn't return "node_modules", for example.
Make sure awk is referenced unaliased, per https://github.com/creationix/nvm/issues/162#issuecomment-50284503
Should escape grep in nvm_ls
fix nvm_curl arguments for stdout
use regex triplet, add unit test
Use sed -e instead of -E
add quotes
remove parentheses
fix copy-packages
removed_lines: -        INSTALLS=`nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm -g -p ll | \grep "$ROOT\/[^/]\+$" | cut -d '/' -f 8 | cut -d ":" -f 2 | \grep -v npm | tr "\n" " "`
added_lines: +        local INSTALLS=`nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm -g -p ll | \grep "$ROOT\/[^/]\+$" | cut -d '/' -f $(($ROOTDEPTH + 2)) | cut -d ":" -f 2 | \grep -v npm | tr "\n" " "`

nvm-sh/nvm.message: fix handle cases of grep aliases as described in to resolve #207
removed_lines: -        INSTALLS=`nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm -g -p ll | grep "$ROOT\/[^/]\+$" | cut -d '/' -f 8 | cut -d ":" -f 2 | grep -v npm | tr "\n" " "`
added_lines: +        INSTALLS=`nvm use $VERSION > /dev/null && npm -g -p ll | \grep "$ROOT\/[^/]\+$" | cut -d '/' -f 8 | cut -d ":" -f 2 | \grep -v npm | tr "\n" " "`

nvm-sh/nvm.message: changed shasums file url because in v0.8.6 .txt.asc file is not available.
Fixed incorrect sorting of versions

- version detection now works with zsh
- curl routine now compatible with zsh
- changed curl to use --progress-bar instead of unsafe shorthand (-#)
add support for release directories ( e.g. >= v0.5.1 )
removed_lines: -        for VER in `curl -s http://nodejs.org/dist/ -o - | grep 'node-v.*\.tar\.gz' | sed -e 's/.*node-//' -e 's/\.tar\.gz.*//'`; do
added_lines: +        for VER in `curl -s http://nodejs.org/dist/ -o - | grep 'v[0-9].*' | sed -e 's/.*node-//' -e 's/\.tar\.gz.*//' -e 's/<[^>]*>//' -e 's/\/<[^>]*>.*//'`; do

nvm-sh/nvm.message: Make the gist work as it's own repo.
added_lines: +      ls "$NVM_DIR" | grep -v src | grep -v nvm.sh | grep -v README.markdown
